_comment: v12: switch loss from MSE-on-embeddings to temperature-scaled cosine cross-entropy. Architecture and corpus frozen at v11 (controls). Single-variable test of the loss-function hypothesis. v9 refuted capacity, v11 refuted corpus volume; this tests the remaining structural choice that makes engram non-standard. Research: cross-entropy is universal for tokens; MSE on continuous embeddings rewards predicting average plausible neighbor (= word salad). All other hyperparameters identical to v11_dialog_2corpus.
